svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.5.2" pages="3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Cloud-only vs Cloud-Edge" id="NIn5RWuukqtn3lN9CIL4"> <mxGraphModel dx="1360" dy="799" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#bdbdbd;fontStyle=1;" value="Cloud-only (send everything upstream)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="500" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-3" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Factory floor
5,000 sensors
1 Hz telemetry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-4" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#fff8e1;" value="WAN / Internet
(variable latency, outages)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="260" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-5" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Cloud region
Ingress + Queue
Processing + Alerts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="200" x="240" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-6" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#c62828;fillColor=#ffebee;" value="Control decision returns to site
(late by design if ms needed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="240" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-8" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-9" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-10" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-2" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-6" value="stop / alert"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#bdbdbd;fontStyle=1;" value="Cloud-edge (decisions placed where they make operational sense)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="540" x="560" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-12" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Factory floor
5,000 sensors
1 Hz telemetry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="20" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-13" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fillColor=#e8f5e9;fontStyle=1;" value="Far edge
Controllers / PLCs
Immediate actions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="260" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-14" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fillColor=#e8f5e9;fontStyle=1;" value="Edge gateway
Filtering + aggregation
Low-latency control logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="260" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-15" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#fff8e1;" value="WAN / Internet
(used for aggregates + coordination)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="260" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-16" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Cloud
Heavy analytics
Fleet coordination
Long-term storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="260" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-18" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-12" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-13"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-19" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-13" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-14"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-20" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-14" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-15" value="aggregates / summaries"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-21" edge="1" parent="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-11" source="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-15" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8qC4Ew87WBgXGrUAQrpG-16"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram id="VF_3Am1YB7rmD1Q-ZgFM" name="bandwidth-math"> <mxGraphModel dx="1360" dy="799" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Assumptions
• 5,000 sensors
• 1 update/sec (1 Hz)
• payload ≈ 500 bytes (after overhead)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="360" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Rate
5,000 msgs/sec" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="480" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Bytes/sec
5,000 × 500 = 2,500,000 B/s
≈ 2.5 MB/s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="760" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Bits/sec
2.5 MB/s ≈ 20 Mbps sustained" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="760" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Per day
≈ 216 GB/day (raw telemetry)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="760" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="Per 30-day month
≈ 6.5 TB/month
(one site)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="760" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fillColor=#e8f5e9;fontStyle=1;" value="If closer to 1 KB/update
≈ 13 TB/month" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="760" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-11" edge="1" parent="1" source="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-12" edge="1" parent="1" source="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-16" edge="1" parent="1" source="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-7" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="bK3ONMMdQM9Fx6Cwq66H-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram id="_TNOrm_gGU6uCqt9mvGj" name="migration-playbook"> <mxGraphModel dx="1360" dy="1899" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="1) Pick One Workflow
Latency-sensitive + high telemetry volume" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="280" x="60" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;fillColor=#e3f2fd;fontStyle=1;" value="2) Baseline Current State
Measure p95 latency, WAN GB/day, outage impact, and transport cost" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="320" x="380" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fillColor=#e8f5e9;fontStyle=1;" value="3) Move Fast Path to Edge
Deploy local filtering, aggregation, and control logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="320" x="740" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-6" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" value="Targets Met?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="220" x="790" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fillColor=#e8f5e9;fontStyle=1;" value="4a) Promote Pattern
Roll out to production and templatize for next workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="320" x="740" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#ef6c00;fillColor=#fff3e0;fontStyle=1;" value="4b) Tune Placement
Adjust thresholds, batching, retry policy, and local failover" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="320" x="1170" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="Cloud Still Matters
Keep heavy analytics, fleet coordination, and long-term storage centralized." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="280" x="760" y="-70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#f9a825;fillColor=#fff8e1;fontStyle=1;" value="Success Criteria (example)
- p95 decision latency reduced (for example, to < 50 ms)
- WAN telemetry volume reduced (for example, by 40-60%)
- Outage blast radius stays local
- Monthly transport costs trend down" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="340" x="730" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-11" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-12" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-7" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-8" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1330" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-16" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-8" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-5" value="Iterate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-17" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-7" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-18" edge="1" parent="1" source="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-9" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="8V9ffBGD0s6dMpah7zho-5" value="Centralized services"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 270px; margin-left: 781px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;
